lines.text: TENGRI IS THE SOURCE OF IMPORTANT WRITINGS. ONL
Y THE CHOSEN SOULS KNOW THE MEANING. WORTHY A
RE THOSE WHO ASK QUESTIONS, SEEK THE TRUTH AND US
E THEIR MINDS.
YOUR FAITH WILL WEAKEN YOU. EVERYTHING WHAT
YOU BELIEVE IN, YOU MUST FORGET NOW. BELIEVING
IS NOT KNOWING. ONLY WITH KNOWLEDGE YOU WILL FI
ND ENLIGHTENMENT. LIKE THE OTHERS BEFORE YOU,
YOU WILL UNDERSTAND EVERYTHING BETTER.
TENGRI HAS MANY NAMES. "TIAN", "TIANDI", "RANGI", "
SHANGDI", "SHADDAI", "DINGIR" OR "TENGERE" ARE SO
ME OF THIS NAMES.
TENGRI GAVE YOU CLEAR SIGNS. IMPORTANT HINTS W
ERE HIDDEN IN WRITINGS. NO ONE COULD DECIPHER
THEIR REAL MEANING UNTIL THIS DAY. IT IS NOW TI
ME TO LIFT THE SECRET.
{symbol, Chinese Oracle script for tian 天 "heaven"}
{PAGE 1 — visual elements}
script is the earliest attested form of Chinese writing, used on
oracle bones for divination in the late Shang dynasty (~1250–1050 BCE).
The character sits centred below the four prose blocks. }

descriptions: { - one Chinese Oracle-script character for 天 (tiān, "heaven"); Oracle
